svg.title: Hamster dozing loop v1
svg.desc: Self-contained dozing-loop SVG: the hamster dozes in place with breathing body, face, hands, and tie motion, without Zzz decoration. This is the full-sleep dozing state loop, not idle-to-sleep or wake-up transition animation.
svg.metadata: { "export": "dozing-loop-v1-scripted", "state": "dozing", "source": "drafts/sleeping-motion-v1/sleeping-doze-v1/hamster-sleeping-doze-v1.html", "sourceFrame": "drafts/sleeping-motion-v1/sleeping-doze-v1/export-v1/hamster-sleeping-doze-lift-frame-v1.svg", "generated": "2026-06-10", "durationMs": 5600, "keyframes": { "lift": { "faceLowerCover": 12, "faceLowerSpread": 6, "faceLowerY": 0, "facePitch": 70, "faceYaw": -30, "headAngle": -10.5, "sleepMouthInset": 19 }, "sink": { "faceLowerCover": 12, "faceLowerSpread": 6, "faceLowerY": 0, "facePitch": 75, "faceYaw": -35, "headAngle": -12.5, "sleepMouthInset": 22 } }, "notes": [ "Self-contained scripted SVG: PNG hand patches are embedded as data URLs; no fetch is needed.", "0% and 100% use the lift frame; 50% uses the sink frame, so the loop closes without a jump.", "Animation drives the locked sleep head angle, V15-derived head/cheek paths, face transforms, blush clip, and tiny mouth-corner breathing difference.", "Sleeping bean eyes stay hidden; downward closed-eye arcs remain visible under the sunglasses.", "Scripted animation may not run when embedded as a plain img; use object/iframe or a trusted scripted SVG runtime." ] }

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways

g.transform: translate(-3 8) translate(34 24) rotate(-7) skewX(-5) scale(0.98 1.04) translate(-34 -24)
